SPN.Label.Title: Title
SPN.Settings.Menu.Name: Sephral's Player Notes
SPN.Settings.Menu.Label: Open Dashboard
SPN.Settings.Menu.Hint: Open the global Player Notes dashboard.
SPN.Settings.ActorSheetButtons.Name: Actor sheet header buttons
SPN.Settings.ActorSheetButtons.Hint: Show a GM-only Player Notes button on supported Actor sheets.
SPN.Settings.ActorDirectoryIndicators.Hi: Show GM-only note indicators in the Actor Directory.
SPN.Settings.TokenIndicators.Name: Token indicators
SPN.Settings.TokenIndicators.Hint: Show GM-only token indicators for urgent or next-session notes and enable the Token HUD shortcut.
SPN.Settings.DefaultStatus.Name: Default note status
SPN.Settings.DefaultStatus.Hint: Choose the default status used for newly created notes.
SPN.Settings.HideArchived.Name: Hide archived by default
SPN.Settings.HideArchived.Hint: Hide archived notes automatically in dashboards and Actor views until they are explicitly shown.
SPN.Settings.Debug.Name: Debug mode
SPN.Settings.Debug.Hint: Log note validation, import, migration, and orphan cleanup details to the console.
SPN.Settings.DefaultView.Name: Default dashboard view
SPN.Settings.DefaultView.Hint: Choose which view the Player Notes dashboard opens with.
SPN.Settings.Language.Name: Module language
SPN.Settings.Language.Hint: Choose the language used by Player Notes windows and dialogs, or follow Foundry's language.
SPN.Settings.Popup.Name: Session reminder popup
SPN.Settings.Popup.Hint: Show a compact GM-only popup listing Next Session notes when the world is opened.
SPN.Hotkey.OpenDashboard.Name: Open Player Notes Dashboard
SPN.Hotkey.OpenDashboard.Hint: Open the global Player Notes dashboard.
SPN.Hotkey.OpenSelected.Name: Open Player Notes for selected token
SPN.Hotkey.OpenSelected.Hint: Open Player Notes for the currently selected token's Actor.
SPN.Hotkey.QuickNote.Name: Create quick note for selected token
SPN.Hotkey.QuickNote.Hint: Create a quick Player Note for the currently selected token's Actor.
SPN.Notification.GMOnly: Only GMs can use Player Notes.
SPN.Notification.NoToken: Select a token with an Actor first.
SPN.Dialog.Delete.Title: Delete Player Note
SPN.Dialog.Delete.Content: Delete this note permanently? This cannot be undone.
SPN.Dialog.Import.Title: Import Player Notes
SPN.Dialog.Import.NoFile: Choose a JSON file to import.
SPN.Dialog.Export.Title: Export Player Notes
SPN.Dialog.Orphans.Title: Orphaned Player Notes
SPN.Dialog.Popup.Title: Next Session Reminders
SPN.Dialog.Popup.Empty: No Next Session notes are waiting.
SPN.Import.Warning: Existing notes are never overwritten without explicit confirmation.
SPN.ActorNotes.Title: Player Notes
SPN.Tooltip.Export: Open export options for JSON or Markdown.
SPN.Tooltip.ImportJson: Import Player Notes from a JSON export.
SPN.Tooltip.Orphans: Review notes whose Actors are missing.
SPN.Tooltip.OpenActorNotes: Open this Actor's Player Notes window.
SPN.Tooltip.OpenDashboard: Open the global Player Notes dashboard.
SPN.Tooltip.HideActor: Hide this Actor from Player Notes tracking.
SPN.Tooltip.ShowActor: Show this Actor in Player Notes tracking again.
SPN.Tooltip.ActorHeaderNotes: Open Player Notes for this Actor. The number is currently open notes.
